content.full_text:
October 2, 1980

Mr. Keith Rosen, C.P.A.
13701 Riverside Drive, Suite 500
Sherman Oaks, California 91423

Dear Mr. Rosen:

This letter is in response to your request of September 11, 1980.

You asked if an individual hosted a party, and the cost of which exceeds $5,000.00, for an elected officeholder, what filing obligation is incurred by the officeholder, the officeholder's controlled committee and the individual who hosted the party?

I advised, that if the individual sponsored the party at the officeholder's "behest," which is defined as a payment made under the control or at the direction of a candidate, controlled committee, official committee of a political party, or organization formed or existing primarily for political purposes (2 Cal. Adm. 18215), then the following filing obligations are incurred.

1. The individual must file as a major donor on campaign statement form no. 461 since the expenditures exceeded $5,000.00. Government Code Section 82013(c).

2. The officeholder and the controlled committee must report receipt of an in-kind contribution from the major donor on Schedule C of the consolidated campaign statement form no. 490. Government Code Section 84210(g).

However, if the individual sponsored the party strictly independent of the officeholder, where there was no cooperation or assistance from the officeholder or from any member of his staff, then the filing obligation falls solely to the individual who sponsored the party. Since the expenditure exceeded $500.00, the individual would then qualify as an independent expenditure committee and must file a form 461 showing the expenditures made. Government Code Section 82013(b). The officeholder, nor his controlled committee has any obligation to report "independent expenditures" on their campaign statements.

Mr. Keith Rosen  
Page 2  
October 2, 1980

I hope that this information is helpful to you, please do not hesitate to contact me if you should have any further questions.

Sincerely,

[handwritten signature]
Helen P. Arriola  
Political Reform Consultant

HPA:jg
